zh.Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Atte de la Hyde於1365年出生在英國波克夏丹華斯時，他的父親John de La Hyde I10歲，母親Lady Matilde de Massey6歲。他於從1417年到1418年與Garciana Branch在英國波克夏丹華斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1447年7月21日在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Atte de la Hyde于1365年出生在英国波克夏丹華斯时，他的父亲John de La Hyde I10岁，母亲Lady Matilde de Massey6岁。他于从1417年到1418年与Garciana Branch在英国波克夏丹華斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1447年7月21日在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Atte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which was derived in the medieval period from the Old English personal name Tāta.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Atte de la Hyde was born in 1365, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, his father, John de La Hyde I, was 10 and his mother, Lady Matilde de Massey, was 6. He married Garciana Branch from 1417 to 1418, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 21 July 1447, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Atte de la Hyde est né en 1365, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John de La Hyde I, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Lady Matilde de Massey, avait 6 ans. Il a épousé Garciana Branch du 1417 au 1418, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1447, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

Er hat von 1417 bis 1418 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England Garciana Branch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 21. Juli 1447 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Garciana Branch da 1417 a 1418, nel Denchworth, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: John Atte de la Hyde(이)가 1365년 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de La Hyde I(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Matilde de Massey(은)는 6세였다. 그는 1417년 부터 1418년 까지 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 Garciana Branch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1447년 7월 21일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Garciana Branch de 1417 a 1418, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Atte de la Hyde родился в 1365 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de La Hyde I было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Matilde de Massey, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Garciana Branch с 1417 по 1418 в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 21 июля 1447 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия.
